$comment: Agent-editable contract-status data for test_api_contract.py. The test logic itself is in apps/tests/invariants/test_api_contract.py and is HUMAN-OWNED (protected by .claude/hooks/protect-invariants.sh). This file is NOT protected — the Phase 2 BE generator agent flips entries here as features land. Schema is enforced by test_api_contract.py at load time; bad shapes cause loud test failures.

expected_missing.$comment: Contract endpoints not yet implemented in the app. Each entry: 'METHOD path' → plan-JSON feature_id that will deliver it. Phase 2 BE generator removes its feature's entries when finishing. An entry that's already implemented produces a test failure ('falsely missing' check) so this list shrinks monotonically.

legacy_routes.$comment: Pre-rewrite HTML/HTMX endpoints that exist today on apps/web and will be deleted as their replacement contract endpoints land. Each entry: 'METHOD path' → short why/what-replaces-it note. The set must shrink to empty by the end of Phase 2; do NOT extend it. The BE generator removes an entry in the same commit that deletes the corresponding route handler from the app code.
